entry.title: Wendy's Welcomes New Cheesy Bacon Cheeseburger and More
entry.summary:
Wendy's serves up the new Cheesy Bacon Cheeseburger as its latest limited-time burger. The new menu item is joined by the new Chicken Tenders Ranch Wrap and the return of the chain's Crispy Panko Fish Sandwich.
The Cheesy Bacon Cheeseburger features a quarter-pound beef patty, applewood-smoked bacon, two slices of American cheese, and cheddar cheese sauce (the same sauce that you can get on the chain's baked potatoes), served on a toasted bun. The Chicken Tenders Ranch Wrap is similar to the Grilled Chicken Wrap, only with chicken tenders instead of grilled chicken. It features two crispy-fried chicken tenders, ranch, lettuce, and shredded cheddar cheese, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. Available through April 5, 2026, Wendy's Crispy Panko Fish Sandwich features a crispy-fried, panko-crusted, wild-caught Alaskan pollock fish filet served with shredded lettuce, dill tartar sauce, American cheese, and crinkle-cut pickles on a toasted bun. Prices vary, but the Cheesy Bacon Cheeseburger ranges from $7.29 (with a single patty) to $9.29 (with triple patties) at my local Wendy's here in Los Angeles. The Chicken Tenders Ranch Wrap goes for $6.79, while the Crispy Panko Fish Sandwich is $6.29. Photo via Wendy's. Nutritional Info - Wendy's Cheesy Bacon Cheeseburger - Single Calories - 560 Fat - 33g (Saturated Fat - 15g) Sodium - 1180mg Carbs - 32g (Sugar - 5g) Protein - 34g Nutritional Info - Wendy's Chicken Tenders Ranch Wrap Calories - 590 Fat - 28g (Saturated Fat - 7g) Sodium - 1350mg Carbs - 54g (Sugar - 2g) Protein - 29g Nutritional Info - Wendy's Crispy Panko Fish Sandwich Calories - 510 Fat - 25g (Saturated Fat - 6g) Sodium - 1280mg Carbs - 51g (Sugar - 6g) Protein - 21g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell Launches New Chicken Bacon Ranch Street Chalupas and Chicken Bacon Ranch Nacho Fries
entry.summary:
Taco Bell launches new Chicken Bacon Ranch Street Chalupas and Chicken Bacon Ranch Nacho Fries for a limited time.
Chicken Bacon Ranch Chalupas come two to an order and feature two toasted cheddar mini Chalupa shells filled with slow-roasted chicken (i.e., Cantina chicken), bacon, pico de gallo, shredded cheddar cheese, and Avocado Ranch Sauce. The suggested price per order is $5.99. You can also get Chicken Bacon Ranch Street Chalupas as part of a $9 Discovery Luxe Box, which includes an order of Chicken Bacon Ranch Street Chalupas, a Cheesy Bean & Rice Burrito, chips and nacho cheese sauce, and a medium fountain drink. Chicken Bacon Ranch Nacho Fries feature seasoned fries topped with slow-roasted chicken, bacon, warm nacho cheese sauce, Avocado Ranch Sauce, and pico de gallo. It carries a suggested price of $4.99. Chicken Bacon Ranch is a combination that Taco Bell occasionally trots out on a limited-time basis. Other past items featuring the combination (that you probably don't remember) include the Bacon Ranch Tortada, Bacon Ranch Chicken Flatbread Sandwich, and more. The Bacon Club Chalupa was probably its most popular iteration. Photo via Taco Bell. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Chicken Bacon Ranch Street Chalupas - 2 Chalupas Calories - 620 Fat - 41g (Saturated Fat - 11g) Sodium - 1220mg Carbs - 38g (Sugar - 4g) Protein - 25g Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Chicken Bacon Ranch Nacho Fries Calories - 350 Fat - 24g (Saturated Fat - 4g) Sodium - 940mg Carbs - 22g (Sugar - 2g) Protein - 13g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: McDonald's - Big Arch Burger
entry.summary:
McDonald's Big Arch is a limited-time burger that features two quarter-pound beef patties, three slices of pasteurized process white cheddar cheese, crispy-fried onions, slivered fresh onions, pickles, shredded iceberg lettuce, and new Big Arch Sauce, served on a toasted sesame and poppy seed bun.
I paid $8.59 for a Big Arch at my local McDonald's.
Big Arch Sauce is described by McDonald's as "the perfect balance of mustard, pickle, and sweet tomato flavors. It comes off as a more mustard-forward, more complex, tangier take on Big Mac Sauce. It's familiar but different. They forgot the pickles on my burger, but I didn't miss them, as the Big Arch Sauce provided plenty of acidity.
The bun was softer but less plush than the typical McDonald's sesame seed bun. It didn't have the same spring as the regular bun. The poppy seeds added some visual appeal and a smattering of texture.
The beef patties were moist, sporting a coarse grind and a well-seared crust, providing an enjoyable mix of flavor and texture. The white cheddar was milder than American cheese. It was nicely melted and complemented the beef well. The crispy onions provided a bit of sweetness and delicate crispiness, while the slivered onions were good for a watery crunch and onion-y bite. The lettuce was mostly there for visual appeal and color.
Overall, McDonald's Big Arch turned out pretty well. It's basically a meatier, cheesier, and slightly fancier take on the chain's signature Big Mac (minus the middle bun). Nutritional Info - McDonald's Big Arch Calories - 1020 Fat - 65g (Saturated Fat - 25g) Sodium - 1760mg Carbs - 59g (Sugar - 10g) Protein - 53g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: Trader Joe's - Toasted Coconut Mini Sheet Cake
entry.summary:
Trader Joe's Toasted Coconut Mini Sheet Cake is described on its lid as a "moist, flavorful toasted coconut cake with a toasted coconut cream cheese frosting." It's a limited-time, seasonal item.
An 18-oz cake cost me $5.99.
The Toasted Coconut Mini Sheet Cake was dense and very moist (from a combination of coconut milk and buttermilk). The combination of cake and frosting was sweet but not too sweet. It was less sweet than similar Trader Joe's cakes that I've tried.
There was a moderate and pleasant coconut flavor throughout, and the added texture of shredded coconut in both the icing and the cake. However, despite the description, I didn't pick up on any toasted coconut notes; it just tasted like plain coconut.
When it comes down to it, Trader Joe's Toasted Coconut Mini Sheet Cake made for good eating. I particularly enjoyed the flavor and sweetness level. Nutritional Info - Trader Joe's Toasted Coconut Mini Sheet Cake Serving Size - 1/6 cake (85g) Calories - 320 Fat - 16g (Saturated Fat - 9g) Sodium - 230mg Carbs - 40g (Sugar - 28g) Protein - 3g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell Digital Deals Through Mid-March 2026
entry.summary:
Here are the upcoming digital deals at Taco Bell through mid-March 2026. The slate includes Tuesday Drops along with in-app and third-party deals.
Tuesday Drops
3/3/26 - $1 Chicken Quesadilla for first 30,000 Rewards Members at 2PM PT (limit 1 per user). 3/17/26 - $1 Chalupa Supreme for first 30,000 Rewards Members at 2PM PT (limit 1 per user).
In-App Deals
3/15/26 - Get 20% off your order with the purchase of a Taco Party Pack (up to a $7 discount)
Third-Party Deals
3/3/26 - Free Seasoned Beef Soft Taco with a $15+ order for Uber One student customers. 3/6/26 to 3/8/26 - Free Beefy 5-Layer Burrito with a $22+ order on DoorDash. 3/6/26 to 3/7/26 - Free Regular Nacho Fries with the purchase of a Crunchwrap Supreme on Uber Eats. 3/6/26 to 3/8/26 - Buy-one-get-one Chalupa with a $20+ order on Grubhub. 3/9/26 to 4/5/26 - Free Chicken or Cheese Quesadilla with a $22+ order on Uber Eats. 3/10/26 - Free Seasoned Beef Soft Taco with a $15+ order for Uber One student customers. 3/10/26 - Free Chalupa Supreme with a $20+ order on DoorDash. 3/13/26 to 3/15/26 - Free Beefy 5-Layer Burrito with a $22+ order on Grubhub. 3/13/26 to 3/15/26 - Free Chicken or Cheese Quesadilla with a $22+ order on DoorDash. 3/17/26 - Free 2-pack of Cinnabon Delights with a $20+ order on DoorDash. 3/17/26 - Free Doritos Locos Tacos or Doritos Locos Tacos Supreme with a $20+ order on Grubhub. 3/17/26 - Free Seasoned Beef Soft Taco with a $15+ order for Uber One student customers.
Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Dairy Queen Debuts New Mint Crunchin' Cookie Dipped Cone
entry.summary:
With St. Patrick's Day on the horizon, Dairy Queen trots out the mint and launches the new Mint Crunchin' Cookie Dipped Cone while featuring the regular menu Mint Oreo Blizzard.
The Mint Crunchin' Cookie Dipped Cone features vanilla soft serve dipped in a green mint-flavored cone coating with chocolaty cookie crumbles. Additionally, Dairy Queen offers a series of "Mint Crunchin' Cookie Hacks" that are available while the mint-flavored cone coating is around and include:
Mint Crunchin' Cookie Blizzard Treat & Sidecar - Vanilla soft serve mixed with Mint Crunchin' Cookie Cone Dip, served with a cup ("sidecar") of Mint Crunchin' Cookie Cone Dip so you can add some to every bite of the Blizzard. Mint Crunchin' Cookie Parfait - Vanilla soft serve layered with Mint Crunchin' Cookie Cone Dip and Oreo Cookie pieces.
The Mint Oreo Blizzard is the Blizzard of the Month for March 2026 and features vanilla soft serve mixed with Oreo cookie pieces and creme de menthe. While the Mint Oreo Blizzard is available year-round, the Mint' Crunchin' Cookie Dipped Cone is now available for a limited time at participating locations nationwide. Photo via Dairy Queen. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Bakes New Strawberry Biscoff Cookie
entry.summary:
Crumbl bakes its new Strawberry Biscoff Cookie as part of this week's menu rotation, available from March 2 through March 7, 2026.
The cookie bakery chain features a limited-time weekly menu that usually includes four desserts (alongside a permanent "Classics" menu). This week's rotating lineup includes: - New Strawberry Biscoff Cookie (pictured) - A warm cookie with a melty Biscoff center and crunchy Biscoff topping, finished with strawberry cream cheese frosting and a fresh strawberry slice. - Cinnamon Square - A warm cinnamon cake square marbled with brown sugar-cinnamon butter and topped with a light vanilla cream cheese frosting. - Sea Salt Toffee Cookie - A warm cookie packed with toffee and milk chocolate chips, topped with a sprinkle of flaky sea salt. - Galaxy Brownie Cookie - A warm brownie cookie smothered in a warm fudge glaze and finished with a sprinkle of rainbow candy bits. Photo via Crumbl Cookies. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Habit Burger Introduces New Baja Crispy Fish Sandwich and More
entry.summary:
Habit Burger & Grill launches its new Baja Crispy Fish sandwich alongside Cheesy Street Corn Tots and the Blue Wave Shake.
The Baja Crispy Fish sandwich features beer-battered wild Alaska cod served with cilantro-lime coleslaw, pickled red onions, and Baja sauce on a toasted brioche bun. Cheesy Street Corn Tots are fried cheesy tots made with sweet corn, peppers, and fresh cilantro. A choice of dipping sauce is included (Avocado Ranch is the recommended pairing). The Blue Wave Shake features a swirled blue, vanilla shake mixed with pineapple and coconut flavors, topped with whipped cream. Prices vary, but the Baja Crispy Fish costs $11.19 near me in Los Angeles, while Cheesy Street Corn Tots cost $4.99, and the Blue Wave Shake is $5.89. All three items are available now for a limited time at participating locations chain-wide. Photo via Habit Burger & Grill. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: $1 Egg McMuffin or Sausage McMuffin with Egg at McDonald's on March 2, 2026
entry.summary:
McDonald's will be celebrating "National Egg McMuffin Day" on Monday, March 2, 2026, by offering a deal where you can get either an Egg McMuffin or a Sausage McMuffin with Egg for $1 exclusively through the McDonald's mobile app.
The Egg McMuffin features a fresh-cracked cage-free egg served with Canadian bacon and American cheese on a toasted and buttered English muffin. The Sausage McMuffin with Egg is the same as an Egg McMuffin, only with a sausage patty instead of Canadian bacon. Prices vary, but both breakfast sandwiches normally cost $4.99 at my local McDonald's here in Los Angeles. The deal is limited to one discounted breakfast sandwich per customer during breakfast hours. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Krispy Kreme Welcomes New Golden Oreo Donut and More
entry.summary:
Krispy Kreme partners with Oreo to feature two new, limited-time donuts and one regular-menu donut in the Krispy Kreme x Oreo Cookie Collection.
Available now at participating Krispy Kreme locations across the country, the collection includes: - New Golden Oreo Donut - An Original Glazed donut topped with Golden Oreo-inspired buttercreme, Golden Oreo cookie crumbles, rainbow sprinkles, and a Mini Golden Oreo cookie. - New Chocolate Oreo Dream Donut - An Original Glazed donut dipped in chocolate icing and Oreo cookie pieces, topped with chocolate-flavored Kreme and an Oreo wafer cookie. - Oreo Cookies & Kreme Donut - A regular menu donut featuring a shell donut filled with Cookies & Kreme filling, dipped in chocolate icing, and topped with Oreo cookie pieces and a drizzle of white icing. The donut chain is offering the Krispy Kreme x Oreo Cookie Dozen, which includes three of each of the donuts, plus three Original Glazed donuts. They're also available for purchase individually and in a special three-pack that includes one of each Oreo donut. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Dutch Bros Releases Three New Childhood-Inspired Drinks
entry.summary:
Dutch Bros aims to evoke childhood nostalgia with the launch of a trio of new childhood-inspired beverages.
Available now for a limited time at all Dutch Bros locations, the lineup includes: - Brown Butter Chocolate Chip - A drink swirled with a drizzle of brown butter chocolate chip sauce and topped with brown butter chocolate chip Soft Top (sweet cold foam) with chocolate crunch pieces. Dutch Bros recommends getting it as a latte, a protein latte, a Freeze, or a cold brew. - Fruit Punch with Sour Candy Straw - A drink mixed with orange, cherry, and pineapple flavors, served with a sour candy straw. It is recommended by the chain as an iced or blended Rebel energy drink or a lemonade. - Kool Blue - A beverage with watermelon and blue raspberry flavors, topped with mango poppin' boba. Give this flavor a try as an iced or blended Rebel energy drink or a lemonade! Photo via Dutch Bros Coffee. Read more at Brand Eating!
